summary: Iteration 16 (refactor regression) - Verified that the PlatformAdmin/AdminTeam/CricketScorer split into /components/admin/* and /components/cricket/* is zero-regression. End-to-end UI tests cover login as super admin, all 14 PlatformAdmin tabs render with no console errors, ServiceEditor modal opens with name/category/price/currency/add-field/add-variant/save (Cancel closes), Events tab CRUD (create 'QA Refactor Cup' -> 'Event created' toast -> row visible -> delete with confirm), Settings tab (facebook_url save + contact_email save both toast OK), AboutTab (mission + founder via PeopleEditor + save), AccountsManager (role chips: organiser/company_admin/vendor/player + search + show-disabled toggle), AdminTeam (invite form has email/name/password + 7 permission checkboxes, creating an admin shows InviteCredentialsBanner with copy button, AdminRow delete works), Companies vs Organisers tab separation logic verified (both tabs render; clean-slate env has 0 rows of each so visual drilldown not exercised but Link href = /platform-admin/companies/{id} is intact). CricketScorer host page (/events/{id}) loads cleanly with title rendered and no JS errors after creating a cricket event.
critical_code_review_comments: CricketScorer.jsx is still 669 lines after extracting CricketScoreboard/BallEntryPanel/InningsPrompts. The remaining hooks/state machine (innings transitions, target chase tracking, undo stack) is the next chunk to split into a useCricketLiveState() hook + a separate WicketPicker file to push CricketScorer under 400 lines.

useFixtureSocket emits a noisy 'Socket error: Event' console.error on every initial connect attempt for events that have no fixture yet. Downgrade to console.warn (or suppress when readyState===0) so genuine WS errors are visible in production.

PlatformAdmin.jsx still inlines the Services list (lines 134-150) and the Bookings/Companies/Organisers lists. Those three remaining inline tabs (~80 lines) could each become a ServicesTab/CompaniesTab/OrganisersTab/BookingsTab module for true consistency with how Events/Vendors/Listings/Settings/About are factored.

EventsTab.jsx and AccountsManager.jsx import their own toast - acceptable, but consider extracting the 'confirm + delete + reload + toast' pattern into a small useConfirmDelete(url, name) hook since it's now duplicated across Events/Team/Vendors/Listings.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on all 14 tabs + service editor + events CRUD + settings save + about save + team invite/banner/delete + accounts chips + cricket event detail page

test_credentials: Super admin admin@kreedanation.com / admin123 (per /app/memory/test_credentials.md). One temp staff admin (qa-refactor-<ts>@kreedanation.com) was created via the invite flow and deleted in the same run. One event 'QA Refactor Cup' and one 'QA Cricket Smoke' were created and deleted in the same run.
seed_data_creation: None persisted. All ephemeral test data (1 staff admin + 2 events) cleaned up via UI delete + dialog accept in the same Playwright run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Refactor is clean. data-testids in the moved files: ServiceEditor uses svc-name/svc-category/svc-currency/svc-price/svc-unit/svc-desc/svc-add-field/svc-add-variant/svc-save (NOT 'service-editor-*'). SettingsTab uses setting-facebook_url / setting-instagram_url / setting-linkedin_url / setting-twitter_url / setting-youtube_url and setting-contact_email plus settings-save and contact-save. AboutTab uses about-mission/about-vision/about-desc/about-save and PeopleEditor exposes founders-add and founders-{i}-name/role/bio (directors-add similarly). InviteAdminForm uses team-new-email/team-new-name/team-new-password/team-new-perm-{permName}/team-create-admin; banner is team-invite-banner with team-invite-copy; AdminRow uses team-admin-{id}, team-edit-{id}, team-delete-{id}, team-edit-name-{id}, team-edit-perm-{id}-{perm}, team-save-{id}. AccountsManager chips are accounts-role-{organiser|company_admin|vendor|player} (note: 'company_admin' NOT 'company'). PlatformAdmin tab triggers are pa-tab-{dashboard|services|events|sports|companies|organisers|bookings|vendors|listings|settings|about|reviews|accounts|team}. EventsTab uses pa-event-name/pa-event-sport/pa-event-format/pa-event-type/pa-event-venue/pa-event-banner/pa-event-stream/pa-create-event-btn and per-row pa-event-row-{id}, pa-event-open-{id}, pa-event-del-{id}. PlatformAdmin top-level: platform-new-service, pa-company-{id}, pa-organiser-{id}. The lone console.error in EventDetail page is from useFixtureSocket (pre-existing, not refactor-induced).
rca of the issue: n/a - no regression found. Refactor is functionally identical to iteration_15 baseline; all testids were preserved verbatim and the original PlatformAdmin tab layout/wiring is unchanged. File-size targets achieved: PlatformAdmin 236 lines (was 715), AdminTeam 98 (was 265), with cricket sub-components 31+53+69=153 lines extracted from the old LivePanel.
